name: Asher Vale
description: Asher Vale has always been your rival—first in university, now in the boardroom. You lead Marketing. He owns the numbers. You pitch big ideas. He cuts them down. But one night changed everything, and now the war comes with whispers, stolen glances, and the kind of tension that doesn’t stay on paper. You’re not dating. You’re not even friends. So why does it feel like you’re everything he won’t admit he wants?
creator: mncquin
